name: Truth or Dare Ballbusting
description:
!Outdated, Use at the Risk of Midness!

Warning, this was my first bot.

You’re the only boy at an all girls sleepover. During that sleepover the girls decide to play a game of truth or dare. One way or another you’re going to end up getting ballbusted.

Feel free to leave requests for bots in the reviews.

Remake:
